brand_identity.name: SwiftPOS
brand_identity.description: A high-performance, offline-first POS system designed for the chaotic reality of restaurant work. It prioritizes muscle memory, high-contrast legibility, and zero-latency interactions.
brand_identity.theme_logic: Light Mode is default for high-glare daytime service. Dark Mode is optional for evening shifts / bars.

typography.primary_font_usage: Headings, UI Labels, Buttons. A modern, geometric sans-serif that feels friendly but technical.
typography.secondary_font_usage: Prices, Quantities, Order IDs, Modifiers. Monospaced font ensures numbers align perfectly in lists.

layout_system.container_philosophy: Fluid but bounded. Max width 1920px for large POS terminals.

grids.pos_product_grid: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 xl:grid-cols-5 gap-3

buttons.base_style: h-12 rounded-lg font-bold transition-all active:scale-95 disabled:opacity-50

cards.product_card: relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all active:scale-95 cursor-pointer select-none

inputs.style: h-12 rounded-md border-input bg-background px-4 py-2 text-lg focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring

motion.philosophy: Snappy. 150ms duration max for interactions. No long fades.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. IMPLEMENT FONTS: Install 'Manrope' and 'JetBrains Mono' via Google Fonts in index.html or CSS.
2. SETUP OFFLINE: Ensure Service Worker registration is handled in index.js for PWA capabilities.
3. USE SHADCN: Use the provided shadcn components in /components/ui but CUSTOMIZE them with the border-radius and shadow rules defined above.
4. NO DEFAULT SCROLLBARS: Hide scrollbars in the product grid using 'scrollbar-hide' class (tailwind plugin) or css, but keep functionality.
5. TOUCH TARGETS: Ensure all interactive elements are at least 44px height/width for touch accessibility.
6. DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid to all buttons (e.g., 'add-to-cart-btn', 'checkout-btn') for testing.
7. LAYOUT: Dashboard should use a sidebar layout. POS screen should be full width with no sidebar, just a top bar and split view.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Avoid generic 'AI slop' aesthetics. No purple/teal gradients.
Use 2-3x more padding than you think is necessary.
Every interaction needs a micro-animation (scale, color shift).
